_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The score has not moved ±2 points in any of the last 33 12h windows — this is a textbook coil where HOLD with conviction is the skilled call, and neither brain has produced a breaker signal strong enough to override the base rate.
next_move.brains_agree: Partial — both see sideways chop and coiling, but Narrative is structurally bullish on the accumulation thesis while Analyst refuses directional commitment citing 0-for-18 record and conflicting factor evidence
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed breaks below 25 (flush continuation) OR vix drops below 14 with btc_momentum holding above 50 (volatility crush precedes breakout)
next_move.invalidated_if: etf_flows collapse below 60 AND funding drops below 35 simultaneously, or fear_greed spikes above 45 with btc_momentum above 60
